Notice And Petition To Confirm Final Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jan-14-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF KATHERINE SCHIFFELER Petition to Confirm Final Arbitration Award by ADR Services, Inc, in the arbitration between Schiffeler and Defendant Robert A. Rabkin. Appearances: Simona Allessandra Agnolucci, Esq. of Howard Rice (415) 4344-1600 appearing for Plaintiff and Moving party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Order & Judgment signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2009 Continued To Feb-19-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice And Petition To Confirm Final Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Dec-24-2009 Continued To Jan-14-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF KATHERINE SCHIFFELER'S PETITION TO CONFIRM FINAL ARBITRATION AWARD.
APPEARANCES: Simona A. Agnolucci, Esq. of Howard, Rice, Nemerovski, Canady, Falk & Rabkin 434-1600 for pltf & moving party; Robert A. Rabkin, 775/455-4177 deft & opposing party (representing himself but to substitute out his atty of record & seeking to obtain new counsel).
RULING: The Court vacated its tentative ruling and continued the matter to 01/14/10 for defendant to obtain new counsel &/or file an opposition on his own behalf (defendant indicates he is representing himself now although the register of actions still shows his attorney as counsel of record, therefore a substitution of attorney needs to be filed). (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
